ResponseBody.title: MLTable specification
ResponseBody.description: An MLTable defines a set of instructions in order to build a table of data.

file.description: This specifies path of file containing data.

folder.description: This specifies path of folder containing data.

pattern.description: This specifies a search pattern to allow globbing of files and folders containing data.

index_columns.description: Sets the table index using existing columns. This trait can be used by partition_by in the data plane to split data by the index.

timestamp_column.description: Defines the timestamp column of the table. This trait can be used in filter transforms, or in other data plane operations (SDK) such as drift detection.

transformations.description: Defined sequence of transformations that are applied to data loaded from defined paths.

read_delimited.description: Reads delimited files from provided paths, splitting them into rows and columns based on separator.

oneOf.description: single column to be selected
list of columns to be selected

read_parquet.description: Reads parquet files from the provided paths using the defined options.

read_json_lines.description: Reads JSON lines file from the provided paths using the defined options.

read_delta_lake.description: Reads parquet files from delta lake using the defined options.

version_as_of.description: integer version to use to read in a specific version of parquet files.

timestamp_as_of.description: datetime string in RFC-3339/ISO-8601 format to use to read in matching parquet files from a specific point in time.

extract_columns_from_partition_format.description: The partition information of each path will be extracted into columns based on the specified format

partition_format.description: Partition format to use to extract data into columns

filter.description: filter rows based on the expression

take.description: take the first N rows from dataset

take_random_sample.description: take a random sample of records in the dataset approximately by the probability specified

skip.description: Skip the first N records from top of the dataset

drop_columns.description: Drop the specified columns from the dataset

oneOf.description: single column to be selected
list of columns to be selected
pattern and properties defining columns to be selected

keep_columns.description: Keep only the specified columns from the dataset

oneOf.description: single column to be selected
list of columns to be selected
pattern and properties defining columns to be selected

convert_column_types.description: Convert the columns specified into the column_type desired

oneOf.description: single column to be selected
list of columns to be selected
pattern and properties defining columns to be selected

list of columns to be selected
